title: Hardy Boys
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: America's most beloved boy detectives — Frank and Joe Hardy solve mysteries that leave adults baffled. Multi-voice dramatized audiobooks from Bodee Books.

title: Ted Scott Flying Stories
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: Daring young aviator Ted Scott takes on the sky in thrilling adventures inspired by the golden age of aviation.

title: Penny Parker Mystery Stories
author: Mildred A. Wirt
description: Penny Parker is a sharp-witted young reporter who can't resist a mystery — no matter how dangerous it turns out to be.

title: Mercer Boys
author: Capwell Wyckoff
description: The Mercer Boys set off on adventures by sea and land in this classic boys' series from the early 20th century.
